creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for submitting a new port Matthias

A couple of cursory review items:

- Use DISTVERSION=5.1.2a updating other variables accordingly
- Strip "XTrackCAD is a" from comment

If you haven't already, please run this port/patch through QA (portlint, poudriere at least), fixing any issues and updating the patch. For details and instructions see:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
